disabled_controls_in_group_count: In the "{group_name}" group, how many controls are disabled?
How many disabled controls are in the "{group_name}" group?
Within "{group_name}", what is the number of disabled controls?
Looking only at the "{group_name}" group, how many controls are disabled?
For the "{group_name}" group, determine how many controls are disabled.
selected_enabled_controls_in_group_count: In the "{group_name}" group, how many controls are both selected and enabled?
How many selected controls in the "{group_name}" group are also enabled?
Within "{group_name}", what is the number of controls that are selected and enabled?
Looking only at the "{group_name}" group, how many controls are selected without being disabled?
For the "{group_name}" group, determine how many controls are both selected and enabled.
disabled_extremum_group_label: Which group has the most disabled controls?
Across the visible groups, what group contains the highest number of disabled controls?
Compare the groups by disabled controls. Which group has the most?
Find the group with the largest count of disabled controls. What is its group name?
Using all groups, identify the group containing the most disabled controls.
selected_enabled_extremum_group_label: Which group has the most controls that are both selected and enabled?
Across the visible groups, what group contains the highest number of selected enabled controls?
Compare the groups by selected controls that are not disabled. Which group has the most?
Find the group with the largest count of selected enabled controls. What is its group name?
Using all groups, identify the group containing the most controls that are selected and enabled.

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:disabled_controls_in_group_count.object_description: grouped labeled controls in a desktop application
query:disabled_controls_in_group_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of disabled controls in the requested group
query:disabled_controls_in_group_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the counted disabled controls

query:selected_enabled_controls_in_group.object_description: grouped labeled controls in a desktop application
query:selected_enabled_controls_in_group.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of controls in the requested group that are both selected and enabled
query:selected_enabled_controls_in_group.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the counted selected enabled controls

query:disabled_extremum_group_label.object_description: grouped labeled controls in a desktop application
query:disabled_extremum_group_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible group name
query:disabled_extremum_group_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the group panel with the most disabled controls

query:selected_enabled_extremum_group_la.object_description: grouped labeled controls in a desktop application
query:selected_enabled_extremum_group_la.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible group name
query:selected_enabled_extremum_group_la.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the group panel with the most selected enabled controls
